summary_en: 600,000 shares (3.09% of issued shares) authorized for acquisition via open-market purchase, up to ¥500M aggregate price, from May 26 to November 27, 2026. Stated reason: stock price perspective and shareholder return.
title_en: Notice of Decisions on Matters Concerning Acquisition of Treasury Stock
translation_en_brief: Rakumachi Inc. announced on May 25, 2026 that its board of directors resolved to authorize the acquisition of up to 600,000 treasury shares, representing 3.09% of issued shares (excluding treasury stock), with an aggregate price ceiling of ¥500 million. The shares will be acquired via open-market purchase during the window from May 26, 2026 to November 27, 2026. The stated rationale combines stock price perspective and shareholder return. As of April 30, 2026, the company held 365,242 treasury shares against 19,388,558 issued shares (excluding treasury stock). The company noted its intention to execute further buybacks if deemed necessary in future periods.
